item.title: Swiss Delvitech raises ₹354-crore, to open mfg plant for optical inspection machines in India - ET Telecom
item.description: Swiss Delvitech raises ₹354-crore, to open mfg plant for optical inspection machines in India

item.title: FANUC America Invests 0M in Michigan Facility to Boost U.S. Robotics Manufacturing
item.description: FANUC America, a global leader in robotics and automation systems, has announced plans for a 0 million investment to acquire property and construct a new 840,000 sq. ft. facility in Michigan providing production-ready space for the potential expansion of the company's existing U.S.-based manufacturing capabilities for robots.

item.title: Designing Inspection Systems for Challenging Surfaces
item.description: Modern manufacturing increasingly relies on full in-line inspections to maintain quality standards, reduce scrap, and improve traceability.

item.title: Evolution Toward Multi-Sensor Measurement Reflects a Broader Transformation in Industrial Metrology
item.description: As manufacturing continues to demand higher precision and greater flexibility, the limits of single-technology measurement systems are becoming increasingly apparent.

item.title: Is Smartphone-Based Visual Inspection the Future of Quality Control?
item.description: The piece discusses the rapid advancements in smartphone camera technology and edge AI processing, predicting a future where accessible, democratized visual inspection tools enable any factory worker to perform quality checks, driving industry-wide improvements.

item.title: Stepping into Metrology Automation – How 3D Scanners Bridge the Gap for Manufacturers
item.description: This article provides insights into how manufacturing companies can harness the potential of 3D scanners within automated environments. It also offers guidance for adopting approaches that balance initial technology investments with future scalability toward end-to-end automation.

item.title: Upgraded PULSE Delivers Advanced Real-Time Environmental Monitoring for Shop-Floor Metrology
item.description: Hexagon’s Manufacturing Intelligence division has announced an evolved version of PULSE, its real-time environmental monitoring solution for coordinate measuring machine (CMM) environments, designed to help manufacturers improve measurement quality and reliability.
